entry.title: Insomnia Cookies Welcomes 2025 Holiday Menu
entry.summary:
Insomnia Cookies bakes a trio of cookies for the 2025 holiday season. They include the new Holiday Munchie Mix, Salted Maple, and Jinglebread cookies.
Here's what you can expect from the cookies. - New Holiday Munchie Mix cookie - A war, brown sugar cookie packed with chocolate-covered pretzel bits, chocolate chunks, marshmallows and red and green M&M's. - Salted Maple cookie - A warm, maple brown sugar cookie with white creme and caramel chips, sprinkled with flaky salt. - Jinglebread cookie - A warm, gingerbread cookie sprinkled with sugar crystals. Prices vary, but the cookies go for $3.69 a piece here in Los Angeles. The chain will be adding to its holiday menu in early December with two more seasonal cookies. On National Cookie Day, December 4, 2025, the Snowball Classic cookie arrives. It's a sugar cookie stuffed with vanilla buttercream and topped with powdered sugar and edible glitter (to sparkle like snow). In celebration of the occasion, the first 100 Insomnia Rewards members who visit any participating US location will nab one Snowball Classic cookie for free. Then on December 9, 2025, the chain rolls out the Candy Cane Classic, a brown sugar cookie packed with peppermint pieces and white chips. Photo via Insomnia Cookies. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Wendy's Offers 67-Cent Small Frosty for Black Friday
entry.summary:
Wendy's is "making Black Friday a little bit sweeter" by offering a 67-cent small Frosty deal (a nod to the viral "6-7" meme) all day on Friday, November 28, 2025.
The deal is available through the Wendy's mobile app or website and in-restaurant on November 28, 2025 at participating locations nationwide. Then, from November 29 through December 7, 2025, it will only be available through the Wendy's app or website. It is limited to one discounted Frosty per order. Frosty prices vary, but a small Frosty normally costs $2.79 at my local Wendy's here in Los Angeles. Photo via Wendy's. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Jimmy John's Debuts New Holiday Magic Cookie
entry.summary:
Jimmy John's introduces the new Holiday Magic Cookie as its seasonal dessert for the 2025 holiday season.
Available now for a limited time, the Holiday Magic Cookie is a soft, chewy sugar cookie packed with red and green Milk Chocolate M&M's, topped with a winter sprinkle mix. Cookie prices vary, but it costs $3.49 at the nearest Jimmy John's here in Los Angeles. That's the same price as the chain's other cookies and its brownie. In celebration of National Cookie Day on December 4, 2026, Jimmy John's will be offering a free Holiday Magic Cookie with any digital purchase (through the Jimmy John's website or mobile app) of $5 or more. Photo via Jimmy John's. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Starbucks' New Frozen Peppermint Hot Chocolate is Exclusive to Target
entry.summary:
Starbucks cafes in Target stores get an exclusive holiday drink: the new Frozen Peppermint Hot Chocolate.
Available now for a limited time at participating Target stores nationwide, the festive drink features a creme Frappuccino blended with mocha sauce, milk, and ice, poured over a layer of peppermint-flavored whipped cream with red and green sprinkles. The drink is then topped with more peppermint-flavored whipped cream and more red and green sprinkles. Photo via Starbucks. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.summary:

entry.title: Popeyes Debuts New Five Nights at Freddy's Menu
entry.summary:
Popeyes partners with the upcoming horror movie, Five Nights at Freddy's 2, to launch its new, limited-time Freddy Fazbear Crunch Menu at participating locations nationwide.
Inspired by the Chuck E. Cheese-like Freddy Fazbear's Pizzeria (where a bulk of the movie takes place), the new menu includes: - Freddy Fazbear Deluxe Box - Priced at $12.99 (may vary), the combo meal includes three classic or spicy fried chicken tenders topped with a garlic parmesan rub, served with new garlic-crusted Cheesy Bites, marinara dipping sauce, a new Cupcake Cup, and a fountain drink. - Freddy Fazbear Box - For $7.99 (may vary), the meal includes three classic or spicy fried chicken tenders topped with a garlic parmesan rub, served with garlic-crusted Cheesy Bites and marinara dipping sauce. - Cheesy Bites with Marinara Sauce ($3.99): Lightly breaded, garlic-crusted, and fried cheese curds made with white cheddar cheese. They're priced at $3.99 (may vary) and come with marinara sauce for dipping. - Cupcake Cup - Priced at $3.99 (may vary), it's a small strawberry-flavored cake topped with pink icing. In addition to the new menu, Popeyes has exclusive collectible sticker packs featuring the film's supernatural animatronics at select Popeyes restaurants nationwide in limited quantities. Photo via Popeyes. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.summary:

The deal is available when using the code "TOPTHIS" in most markets. The price is slightly higher at $6.99 in certain markets, including here in California, and a different code--"TOPTHIS1" needs to be entered instead. The large, two-topping pizza deal is limited to one discounted pizza per order. Prices vary, but a large, 2-topping pizza is normally about $10 at Little Caesars. Photo via Little Caesars. entry.title: KFC Introduces New Gravy Flight
entry.summary:
KFC introduces its new Gravy Flight, featuring three flavors of gravy: Signature Brown, new White Peppercorn, and new Southwest Cheddar Gravy. The fast-food chain is also offering its Pot Pie for $4.99.
The gravy trio is featured as part of this holiday season's Extra Crispy Festive Feast. Priced at $25, the family meal includes three 8-oz sides of gravy (one of each), eight pieces of Extra Crispy fried chicken, four buttermilk biscuits, and two large sides of mashed potatoes. You can also order an individual-sized Gravy Flight or purchase the gravies a la carte. There's also a Gravy Fest Tenders Box that includes three Original Recipe Tenders, a side of fries, a biscuit, the Gravy Flight for dipping, and a drink. Photo via KFC. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Crumbl Bakes a Pie Menu Through November 26, 2025
entry.summary:
Ahead of Thanksgiving, Crumbl's limited-time weekly menu from November 24 through November 26, 2025, includes seven pies.
Here's what the lineup looks like: - Pumpkin Cream Pie - A lightly spiced, whipped pumpkin cheesecake on a graham cracker crust, topped with spiced whipped cream and graham cracker crumbs. - French Silk Pie - A chilled chocolate mousse pie on a cookies & cream crust, and topped with whipped cream and chocolate curls. - Chocolate Peanut Butter Pie featuring Oreo x Reese's - A creamy peanut butter filling packed with Oreo cookie pieces and Reese's Peanut Butter Cups on an Oreo pie crust, topped with whipped cream, chopped Reese's Peanut Butter Cups, and Oreo cookie pieces. - Biscoff Pie (pictured) - A Biscoff–infused cream cheese pie filling on a crunchy Biscoff crust, topped with smooth Biscoff spread, whipped cream, and a Biscoff cookie. - Cookies & Cream Pie - A chilled pie with a cookies & cream crust and cookies & cream filling, topped with whipped cream and crunchy cookie crumbs. - Raspberry Cream Pie - Cheesecake pie filling on a buttery graham crust, topped with house-made raspberry jam and whipped cream. - Brookie Pie - A warm brownie, cookie, and pie all rolled into one, the pie's crust is a semi-sweet chocolate chip cookie. Inside is a brownie topped with a scoop of vanilla bean mousse drizzled with semi-sweet chocolate. In addition to the pies, Crumbl offers a "Secret Menu" where each location selects a flavor to offer (including test flavors). You can find out what's available near you by checking the Crumbl mobile app or website. Photo via Crumbl. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Whataburger Pours New Frosted Berry Whatafresher
entry.summary:
Whataburger is serving up the new Frosted Berry Whatafresher as a holiday beverage for this season.
Available now for a limited time, the Frosted Berry Whatafresher features Hubert's Lemonade mixed with blackberry syrup and blueberry bursties (i.e., blueberry-flavored popping boba), crowned with soft whip topping. The new drink is the holiday/winter follow-up to this summer's Prickly Pear Raspberry Whatafresher. The Frosty Berry Whatafresher carries a suggested price of $3.69 for a 16-oz drink and $3.99 for a 20-oz drink Photo via Whataburger. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: McDonald's Reveals New Grinch Meal
entry.summary:
McDonald's celebrates the holidays this year with everyone's favorite humbug--The Grinch. Starting December 2, 2025, the new Grinch Meal will be available at participating McDonald's restaurants nationwide.
Available for a limited time, the Grinch Meal features the US debut of Dill Pickle "Grinch Salt" McShaker Fries, which includes a packet of tangy dill pickle seasoning, an order of fries, and a McShaker bag to shake them in. The Grinch Salt McShaker Fries are accompanied by a medium drink and your choice of a Big Mac or 10-piece Chicken McNuggets. Also included with each meal is a pair of Grinch-themed socks decorated with messages from the Grinch. There are four collectible socks in all--each in a different color. Photo via McDonald's. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Little Caesars Bakes New Stuffed Crunch Crust Pizza
entry.summary:
Little Caesars debuts the new Stuffed Crunch Crust Pizza as a limited-time variant of its stuffed crust pizza.
It's available now through the Little Caesars mobile app and website ahead of a national launch for everyone, starting November 24, 2025, including Hot-N-Ready availability from 4PM to 8PM. The Stuffed Crunch Crust Pizza features a toasted, cheese-stuffed crust brushed with buttery garlic flavor (the same as is found on the chain's Crazy Bread) and sprinkled with herbs and breadcrumbs. The new pizza is available topped with cheese or pepperoni for $9.49. For a limited time, Little Caesars is also offering its Stuffed Crazy Crust Pizza, an online-exclusive, stuffed-crust pepperoni pizza brushed with buttery-flavored garlic spread and sprinkled with Parmesan for $9.49. It's also available topped with just cheese. Photo via Little Caesars. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Taco Bell Serves Up New Steak & Poblano Rolled Quesadilla
entry.summary:
Taco Bell launches the new Steak & Poblano Rolled Quesadilla as its "reimagining" of a classic quesadilla.
Available now for a limited time, the Steak & Poblano Rolled Quesadilla features grilled marinated steak, a three-cheese blend, new roasted poblano peppers, and Spicy Ranch, rolled up in a warm, flour tortilla. It's available a la carte for a suggested price of $4.99. You can also get it as part of the $9 (may vary) Discovery Luxe Cravings Box, which includes a Steak & Poblano Rolled Quesadilla, a Doritos Locos Tacos, a Crunchy Taco, Chips & Nacho Cheese Sauce, and a medium fountain drink. Photo via Taco Bell. Nutritional Info - Taco Bell Steak & Poblano Rolled Quesadilla Calories - 530 Fat - 28g (Saturated Fat - 14g) Sodium - 1280mg Carbs - 43g (Sugar - 5g) Protein - 26g Read more at Brand Eating!
